channel.title: Comments on: Alaskan Baltic Porter Ale, Ep. 128
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description:
Yes, this is an AWESOME brew! If you can find it ... BUY IT!!
And yes, John, many of us viewers REALLY enjoy the technical details you bring to the bar. Without that depth, we wouldn't be watching.
item.content:encoded:
Yes, this is an AWESOME brew! If you can find it … BUY IT!!

And yes, John, many of us viewers REALLY enjoy the technical details you bring to the bar. Without that depth, we wouldn’t be watching.
